content: All animals have eukaryotic cells, which are cells with a true nucleus and membrane-bound organelles. More specifically, animal cells are a type of eukaryotic cell that lacks a cell wall, unlike plant cells.
raw_content: All animals have eukaryotic cells, which are cells with a true nucleus and membrane-bound organelles. More specifically, animal cells are a type of eukaryotic cell that lacks a cell wall, unlike plant cells.
